# Task: Evaluate Two Architecture Proposals for a Microservice

## Objective

Evaluate two architecture proposals for a notification microservice and select the best one. Write your evaluation to `project/evaluation.md` using the provided template.

## Requirements

1. Read `project/requirements.md` for system requirements.
2. Read `project/arch_a.md` (event-driven with message queue) and `project/arch_b.md` (REST API with polling).
3. Evaluate both on: scalability, cost, complexity, reliability, team fit.
4. Select a winner and justify the decision.
5. Write to `project/evaluation.md` using `project/eval_template.md`.

## Files

- `project/requirements.md` — system requirements
- `project/arch_a.md` — Architecture A: Event-driven
- `project/arch_b.md` — Architecture B: REST polling
- `project/eval_template.md` — evaluation template
- `project/evaluation.md` — write your evaluation here
